  • Uses of GameContext in warzone.controller

    Constructors in warzone.controller with parameters of type GameContext
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CommonController(GameContext p_gameContext)
    constructor with setting game context
     
    ContinentController(GameContext p_gameContext)
    constructor with setting game context and create continent service

    instructor with game context setting and country service initiated

    constructor with setting gameContext and gameEngine

    constructor with setting gamecontext and create mapservice

    constructor with setting gamecontext and create a neighborService

  • Uses of GameContext in warzone.model

    Methods in warzone.model that return GameContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static GameContext
    GameContext.getGameContext()
    This method can return the game context instance and create a new one if it is null.
    Methods in warzone.model with parameters of type GameContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Player.assignReinforcements(GameContext p_gameContext)
    Assign reinforcements to a player based on the continents they have conquered.

  • Uses of GameContext in warzone.service

    Methods in warzone.service with parameters of type GameContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static CommandService
    CommandService.getCommandService(GameContext p_gameContext)
    This method will return command service object from game context.
    static GameEngine
    GameEngine.getGameEngine(GameContext p_gameContext)
    return the game engine if game engine is not created, then create a new game engine
    static RouterService
    RouterService.getRouterService(GameContext p_gameContext)
    This method will return a routerService instance and create it if the instance is null.
    boolean
    MapService.validateMap(GameContext p_gameContext)
    Tarjan method is used in connectivity check condition1: check if more than one country condition2: check if each country belongs to one continent condition3: check if more than one continent condition4: check if each continent has one country condition5: check if each continent is strongly connected condition6: check if the whole map is strongly connected
    Constructors in warzone.service with parameters of type GameContext
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ContinentService(GameContext p_gameContext)
    This method can initiate the game context of this class.
     
    CountryService(GameContext p_gameContext)
    This method will initiate current game context.
     
    MapService(GameContext p_gameContext)
    constructor
     
    NeighborService(GameContext p_gameContext)
    This constructor will initiate the game context of the class.
     
    StartupService(GameContext p_gameContext)
    This constructor can initiate the game context of current instance.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    MapView.printMap(GameContext p_gameContext)
    generate the table of continent information continentId, Name, countryId, Name, neighbours
    static void
    HelpView.printStatus(GameContext p_gameContext)
    This method will print current status of the game from the game context.
